message:
perf: Use pre-built libruntime.a in batch compilation

Batch compilation now links against the pre-built runtime archive
instead of recompiling 236K LOC runtime from source every time.

Changes:
- Add -Druntime-archive build option to batch_build.zig
- Pass runtime archive path when invoking zig build
- Link archive to each test executable

Result: 5 tests in 5.5s (was timing out at 120s before)
